title: How to Actually Build Mobile Apps with AI in 2026 | A Complete Beginner's Tutorial
summary: This tutorial teaches how to build a Duolingo clone in React Native using agents and AI-powered workflows. The approach, called Practical Vibe Coding, leverages multiple tools including Clerk for auth, PostHog for analytics, CodeRabbit for code review, and Vision Agents for AI features.
